name: Scalloped Corn
recipeInstructions:
1. With an electric mixer, beat together the corn, cracker crumbs, eggs, margarine (if using), and evaporated milk until well combined.
2. Add pepper to taste.
3. Pour the mixture into a lightly greased casserole dish.
4. Dot with additional margarine if desired.
5. Bake uncovered at 375°F for 30 minutes or until the center is firm.
